title: Photo Upload Flow with EXIF Extraction
description: Build the complete photo upload experience including upload page UI, file validation (type, size limits), EXIF metadata extraction from images, upload to Supabase Storage, and photo record creation in database. Implement image optimization pipeline generating thumbnails and responsive sizes. Handle upload progress indication and error states. Free tier users limited to 50 uploads (check subscription status). Out of scope: AI analysis of uploaded photos, content moderation.
